case_title: MUSA DIRBAS VS. LAKESHA SHERYL SMITH-WILLIAMS ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIRBAS, MUSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH-WILLIAMS, LAKESHA SHERYL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1624 OAKDALE AVE., SAN FRANCISCO CA 94124, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100187453)** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY **
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIRBAS, MUSA AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH-WILLIAMS, LAKESHA SHERYL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
